title: My thoughts on why Shinji pilots EVA 001
display_title: My thoughts on why Shinji pilots EVA 001
wikitext:
[]: My thoughts on why Shinji pilots EVA-001             Quote Post by Jullebulle10 » Mon May 09, 2022 12:57 am I think he pilots the EVA thats what his father and the world tells him to do. I don't think he has a will of his own , i believe that he want's to gain his fathers approval. As we can see in the series, manga and the rebuild movies Shinjis father uses him and knows that he will continue to listen to him until he gains his fathers approval.

[]: Re: My thoughts on why Shinji pilots EVA-001             Quote Post by WDS » Fri Sep 30, 2022 11:12 pm This is explicitly confirmed by multiple characters in like... every episode.
